debug_info.goal:
case h
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
hmax : IsMin D
x y : PersistenceSubmodule M
hxy : Disjoint x y
hN : x ⊔ y ∈ D
hx : ¬x = ⊥
hy : ¬y = ⊥
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := fun N hN => if N = x ⊔ y then {x, y} else {N}
newD : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M :=
  @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B ⋯ ⋯ ⋯
h : {x, y} = {x ⊔ y}
⊢ False

proof:
have hx : x = x ⊔ y := Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp (h ▸ Set.mem_insert x {y})
    exact hy <| disjoint_self.mp <| hxy.symm.mono_right <| hx.symm ▸ le_sup_right
failed_attempts:
have := h.1.trans h.2.symm
    subst this
    exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
  exact contra hmax

rw [← Set.mem_singleton_iff, ← h]
      exact Set.mem_insert x {y}
    have h_le : y ≤ x := le_of_sup_eq h_eq
    exact hy (hxy.symm.eq_bot_of_le h_le)
  exact contra hmax

have h_le : y ≤ x := le_sup_right.trans_eq h_eq.symm
    exact hy (disjoint_self.mp (hxy.symm.mono_right h_le))
  exact contra hmax

have : x ∈ {x, y} := Set.mem_insert x {y}
      rw [h] at this
      exact (Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp this).symm
    exact hy (hxy.symm.eq_bot_of_le (h_eq.symm ▸ le_sup_right))

have hy_le : y ≤ x := le_sup_right.trans hx_eq.symm.le
    exact hy (hxy.symm.eq_bot_of_le hy_le)

have : x ∈ {x, y} := by simp
      rw [h] at this
      exact Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp this
    have : y ≤ x := by rw [this]; exact le_sup_right
    exact hy (hxy.symm.eq_bot_of_le this)
  exact contra hmax
exact hy (disjoint_self.mp (hxy.mono_left le_sup_right))

have h_le : y ≤ x := le_sup_right.trans (le_of_eq hx_eq.symm)
    have h_bot : y = ⊥ := disjoint_self.mp (hxy.symm.mono_right h_le)
    exact hy h_bot
  exact contra hmax

rcases h with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
    exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
  exact contra hmax

have : x ∈ {x, y} := Set.mem_insert _ _
      rw [h] at this
      exact Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp this
    have hy_le : y ≤ x := le_of_sup_eq hx_eq.symm
    exact hy <| disjoint_self.mp <| hxy.symm.mono_left hy_le
  exact contra hmax

simp only [Set.insert_eq_singleton] at h
    have : x = y := h.1.trans h.2.symm
    subst this
    exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)

exact hy (hxy.symm.eq_bot_of_le (le_sup_right.trans hx_eq.symm.le))
  exact contra hmax

exact hy (disjoint_self.mp (hxy.symm.mono_right (le_sup_right.trans_eq this.symm)))
  exact contra hmax

obtain ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ := h
    exact hx (Disjoint.eq_bot_of_self hxy)
  exact contra
exact hy (hxy.symm.eq_bot_of_le le_sup_right)

have hy_le_x : y ≤ x := hx_eq.symm ▸ le_sup_right
    exact hy (hxy.symm.eq_bot_of_le hy_le_x)
  exact contra hmax

have hx_eq : x = x ⊔ y := Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp (h ▸ Set.mem_insert x {y})
    have hy_le : y ≤ x := hx_eq.symm ▸ le_sup_right
    exact hy (disjoint_self.mp (hxy.mono_left hy_le))
  exact contra hmax

rw [h, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at this
    exact hy (disjoint_self.mp (hxy.mono_left (le_of_sup_eq this.symm)))
  exact contra hmax

rw [← Set.mem_singleton_iff, ← h]
      exact Set.mem_insert x {y}
    have hy_le : y ≤ x := hx_eq ▸ le_sup_right
    exact hy (disjoint_self.mp (hxy.mono_left hy_le))

exact hx (disjoint_self.mp (Disjoint.mono_right le_sup_left hxy))
  exact contra hmax

have hy_in : y ∈ {x ⊔ y} := h ▸ Set.mem_insert_of_mem x (Set.mem_singleton y)
    rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hx_in hy_in
    have : x = y := hx_in.trans hy_in.symm
    subst this
    exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
  exact contra hmax

rw [← Set.mem_singleton_iff, ← h]
      exact Set.mem_insert x {y}
    exact hy (hxy.symm.mono_left (this ▸ le_sup_right)).eq_bot
  exact contra hmax

have hx : x ∈ {x ⊔ y} := by rw [← h]; simp
      have hy : y ∈ {x ⊔ y} := by rw [← h]; simp
      exact (Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp hx).trans (Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp hy).symm
    subst this
    exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
  exact contra hmax
exact hx <| hxy.eq_bot_of_le (this ▸ le_sup_left)

rcases h with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
    exact hx <| hxy.eq_bot_of_le le_rfl

have hy_eq : y = x ⊔ y := by rw [← Set.mem_singleton_iff, ← h]; exact Set.mem_insert_of_mem x (Set.mem_singleton y)
    have : x = y := hx_eq.trans hy_eq.symm
    subst this
    exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
exact hx (disjoint_self.1 (hxy.mono_right (le_of_sup_eq h.2.symm)))

have hy_eq : y = x ⊔ y := Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp (h ▸ Set.mem_insert_of_mem x (Set.mem_singleton_iff.mpr rfl))
    have h_eq : x = y := hx_eq.trans hy_eq.symm
    subst h_eq
    exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)

have hy_le_x : y ≤ x := hx_eq.symm ▸ le_sup_right
    exact hy (disjoint_self.mp (hxy.symm.mono_right hy_le_x))
  exact contra hmax

simp only [Set.insert_eq_singleton] at h
    obtain ⟨hx', hy'⟩ := h
    have : x = y := hx'.trans hy'.symm
    subst this
    exact hx (disjoint_self.mp hxy)
successful_attempts:
have hx : x = x ⊔ y := Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp (h ▸ Set.mem_insert x {y})
    exact hy <| disjoint_self.mp <| hxy.symm.mono_right <| hx.symm ▸ le_sup_right
